title: Schema Catalog
description: Validates the root object in schemas/registry.yaml. Every registered schema artifact in the repository must conform to the catalogEntry definition.

schema_version.description: Semver for the registry document itself

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 date when the catalog was last refreshed

families.description: Registered source and published bundle artifacts

schema_family.description: Top-level subdirectory: aas, odrl, vc, dpp, metering, enterprise-mapping, _shared

artifact_id.description: Stable local identifier — dot-namespaced, e.g. vc.credential-envelope

local_version.description: Semver for the repo-authored artifact or published bundle

upstream_standard.description: Human-readable standard name, or null if entirely repo-authored

upstream_version.description: Release/tag of the upstream standard, or null

formats.description: Serialization formats present for this artifact

entrypoints.description: Relative paths (from schemas/) to primary artifact files

effective_from.description: ISO-8601 date when this artifact becomes valid for use

effective_to.description: ISO-8601 date when this artifact expires, or null for open-ended
